channel.title: Cohere on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Cohere on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: How to Run North Mini Code Locally: Cohere's 30B-A3B Coding Model
item.description: Run North Mini Code 1.0 locally: Cohere's 30B-A3B open-weight coding MoE. GGUF sizes, the llama.cpp build for the cohere2moe architecture, hardware requirements, and benchmarks.
